creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

In your log file there's this error:

File "/usr/ports/deskutils/calibre/work/calibre-src-2.71.0/src/calibre/gui2/viewer/ui.py", line 11, in <module>
	    from PyQt5.Qt import (
	ImportError: cannot import name QWebView

QWebView is part of qt5-webkit-5.6.2, so, could you try reinstalling www/webkit-qt5 and try again?
